title: Flint and Steel - FLAMETHROWER
description: The resource pack turns flint and steel into a real FLAMETHROWER, and it also changes the sounds.
body:
![Flint and Steel - FLAMETHROWER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771a78426b071486831661800b8ad238e0d68ba2.png)

![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7cb24af972c703b54f4f1d0ac6f34096e57fc316.png) **This resource pack for Minecraft turns flint and steel into a real flamethrower, changes the sounds to the most appropriate ones, and animates the flamethrower texture to make it more realistic and similar to a flamethrower.**

**With this resource pack, you will have more fun playing the game.**
![poloska](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb5a23d9aa754e615f86d589eabaa7b45adfb964.png)
![snac](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e04e89260b8b6a17f20a2a80493dfb3a81169b1.png) **what's he doing!**
- changes the texture of flint and steel
- changes the model of flint and steel
- the texture is animated
- changes the sound of flint on steel
- The texture has glowing parts

![heh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fcb388e192264a955a6b0eb6d8a82a39b8a34ea.png)  **Important note**

You will need Optifine for the glowing areas to work properly, but it will still work

![poloska red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbfe25557393799a58b6587cede25b2183f5a5c5.png)
![the strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0076017f3f98f4a5045a198ed3fb213ab7d60ca8.png)
